current_judgment: graph-compact is now integrated into the first stale-risk maintenance path. Active runtime promotion regenerates the compact artifact automatically, runtime refuses stale compact artifacts, and health/runtime payloads expose freshness so operators can detect drift before relation quality silently degrades.
key_evidence: translation_gold_promotion now calls write_graph_sidecar_compact_from_artifacts() after refreshing active chunks and playbook_documents, and records degraded fallback instead of failing the promotion when compact regeneration fails
LocalGraphSidecar now checks full and compact artifact freshness before loading either payload, so stale compact data is ignored and runtime falls back to bounded playbook_documents relations
health payload and runtime report now expose graph_compact_artifact freshness, readiness, and degrade mode
focused regression suite passed with 27 tests, and the dedicated compact end-to-end promotion smoke passed
next_action: If another maintenance path starts mutating active chunks or playbook_documents outside full ingestion, route it through the same artifact freshness helper and compact regeneration contract instead of letting it write runtime state directly.
